title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify the "Don't Allow" and "Cancel" flow in Find My Device when location permission is denied and then cancelled, ensuring the permission prompt reappears after app restart.
steps: Tap "Don't Allow" on location permission prompt.
expected:
1. After step 3, location permission prompt appears with options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow".
2. After step 4, permission prompt shows "Cancel" and "Enable Now" with FMD screen visible in background.
3. After step 5, navigates back to Poly Lens Menu.
4. Steps 6-8 repeat similar behavior as steps 4-5.
